THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BACA, VICTORIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 22 CASTELLO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,795.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,795.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS $15.00 DAILY DAMAGES AFTER DECEMBER 27. 1995. COST PER COST BILL. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
